headline: France's print media in crisis amid massive layoffs
description: Since December 2025, magazine and regional press companies have announced nearly 1,000 job cuts, putting the viability of countless newsrooms at risk.

description: Wembanyama, a French national for the San Antonio Spurs, is only 22 and was named the first unanimous winner in the award's 43-year history.

headline: Apple CEO Tim Cook stepping down in September: 'It has been the greatest privilege of my life'
description: Cook will turn the title over to John Ternus, Apple's head of hardware engineering, on September 1, while remaining involved with the Cupertino, California company as executive chairman.

headline: At Paris's Musée Jacquemart-André, the Huntington Collection immerses visitors in the splendor of Spain's Golden Age
description: Around 40 master paintings by artists such as Velázquez, El Greco and Zurbarán are on loan from New York's Hispanic Society of America.

headline: Why animal welfare reforms have all but vanished from the EU agenda
description: A sweeping legislative overhaul, which was meant to ban caged farming among other measures, has been awaited for more than two years. Since the wave of farmer protests in the winter of 2023-2024, protections for animal welfare have been rolled back.
